summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent Configuration Manager (ACM) completed successfully. Verified all three key changes requested by main agent: 1) Navigation-leave confirm modal using useBlocker with createBrowserRouter, 2) IBM Plex Mono monospace font properly configured in tailwind.config.js, and 3) Slate-900 (black) accent buttons implemented. Backend API maintains 100% functionality (10/10 tests passing). Frontend core functionality working with navigation-leave dialog fully functional as demonstrated.

minor_issues.issue: Agent list shows '0 agents configured' with loading spinner occasionally, despite backend API returning 12 agents
minor_issues.impact: Minor - data loads eventually but may cause delays in testing

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint accessible (200 OK)
List agents returns 12 agents successfully
Search functionality works (E2 query returns results)
Provider filter works (Anthropic filter shows 8 agents)
Get specific agent endpoint returns correct data
Create new agent endpoint works with proper ID generation
Update agent endpoint works and increments version
Version History endpoint lists versions correctly
Clone agent endpoint creates copy with '_copy' suffix
Delete agent endpoint works correctly
Navigation-leave confirm modal appears when unsaved changes exist
Modal shows 'Keep editing' and 'Discard changes' buttons as requested
Keep editing button keeps user on editor page
Discard changes button navigates away successfully
IBM Plex Mono monospace font applied to YAML content (verified: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace)
Slate-900 (black) accent implemented on Save button (verified: rgb(15, 23, 41))
All 7 editor tabs present: General, Model, Toolsets, Overrides, Runtime, Hooks, Raw YAML
Raw YAML tab shows live preview with Copy and Download buttons
Unsaved changes banner appears when modifications made
Agent editor loads successfully when clicking agent rows
Search input and provider filter dropdown present on Agent List page
New Agent button available for creating new agents

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All core functionality working, minor occasional loading delays)
